design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed derived from title+kind+audience+generated_at selects editorial-split hero, Geist typography, gapless-bento-grid + decision-matrix + source-card-dossier components, and GSAP hover-physics + image-scale-fade-scroll. AIDA Check: Attention hero, Interest market proof, Desire workflow guide, Action CTA verified. Font Selection: Geist confirmed. Hero Math Verification: max-width allows 2–3 line H1. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded hover and scroll fades. Label Sweep & Button Check: primary black pill CTA and secondary white CTA verified.
headline: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

site_brief.audience: buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents
site_brief.goal: Create a frequently refreshed editorial blog homepage with a long-form lead analysis, practical how-to explainer, source cards, and a clear Super perspective on why computer-use caching makes repeated agent work cheaper and better. Make it read like a useful market briefing, not a list of summaries.
site_brief.title: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

summary: A practical market briefing for buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents in 2026—covering recent news, computer-use assistants, and why Super’s computer-use cache changes the economics of repeated workflows.
